block_01: On Friday, Donald Trump followed through on his threat of raising tariffs on $200 billion worth of Chinese goods.  He has gone from 10% to 25% tariffs added to products that range from cooked vegetables to baby highchairs. With telephone equipment being the hardest hit category.
block_02: China stated that they are forced to retaliate.  While we can say the world is waiting, the markets have already reacted. Analysts have shown that last week was the worst week for the S&P 500 since December 2018.
